items.title: The Smartest Quantum Computing Stocks to Buy With $1000 Right Now
items.author: The Motley Fool
items.description: Quantum computing is an exciting but still largely unproven technology, with useful applications likely years away. The article recommends investing in tech giants IBM and Alphabet as low-risk ways to gain exposure to the quantum computing space.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: IBM has been a pioneer in quantum computing, with a roadmap for more powerful quantum computers in the coming years. Even if quantum computing doesn't live up to the hype, IBM is a diversified tech giant with other strong business segments.

Alphabet has also made significant progress in quantum computing, demonstrating the ability to reduce errors as it scales up the number of qubits. Like IBM, Alphabet is a diversified tech company that can benefit from quantum computing advancements, even if the technology takes longer to become commercially viable.
